_comment: Synthetic R2c sacred-values DISCRIMINANT cohort (scoring.md §17.4). 30 participants across two channels (protected / card_sort), a SHARED cohort keyed r2c-u00..r2c-u29. Sacredness |P_i| (0..8 `never` slots of 10) is drawn INDEPENDENT of inventory importance (aspirational_self card-sort) and of mean log-price (finite cov cells), so the cohort R² of |P_i| ~ [importance, log-price] is ~0 and its upper 95% CI clears the 0.50 ceiling → R2c SUPPORTED (protectedness is a distinct construct, not merely important-and-expensive). The price predictor is FINITE-only; every `never` carries first_accept_stake=null, never finitized (§13.2). Ground truth: SUPPORTED. Regenerate via scratchpad/gen_r2c.py (never committed).
